title: PATIKIL Waterproof Patch Seal Tape 4 in x 5 Ft, 2 Pack PVC Leak Proof Repair Tape Instant Sealing for HVAC Ducts, Roof Crack, Hoses Pipes, Awning, Clear
features: Color: Clear; Size: 1.5m x 10cm / 5 ft x 4 inch(LxW)); Package List: 2 x Waterproof Tape

Features: This repair tape is made from PVC material, which provides excellent waterproofing properties. It effectively shields surfaces from water infiltration, ensuring leak prevention and maintaining dryness.
Advantage: This tape is equipped with a strong adhesive backing that securely adheres to various surfaces, including metal, plastic, glass, and more.
Instruction: The tape can be easily cut to the desired length and applied smoothly onto different surfaces.

Application: PVC waterproof patch seal tape can be used for home repairs to fix leaks and seal cracks. It is also suitable for outdoor activities like camping, where it can repair tents and inflatable items. Additionally, it can be used for pipe maintenance and boat repairs.
description: Waterproof Patch Seal Tape is a versatile and reliable solution for all your sealing and repairing needs. With its strong adhesive and waterproof properties, this tape effectively fixes leaks, seals cracks, and provides long-lasting protection against water damage.
